year_source.title: Reference year
year_source.quote: Calibration year for Taap simulator v0.3 data pipeline.

tempC_source.title: IMD 1991–2020 Climatological Normals — Santacruz (Mumbai) station
tempC_source.quote: Monthly mean maximum temperature for April at Santacruz: 33.3 °C (1991–2020 normals).

pm25_source.title: Climate Trends & Respirer Living Sciences — Five Years of the National Clean Air Programme (January 2024)
pm25_source.quote: Mumbai's levels went up from 35.8 ug/m3 to 49.5 ug/m3.

canopyPct_source.title: FSI India State of Forest Report 2023 — Table 2.1 Urban Forest Cover by City
canopyPct_source.quote: Mumbai: Tree cover inside urban area — 110.84 sq km. (MCGM municipal boundary area 603 sq km; derived canopy fraction = 110.84 / 603 = 18.4%.)

builtUpPct_source.title: Kavathekar, Tripathy & Chettri (2025) — Land use land cover change and urban heat island effect study of Mumbai metropolitan region using remote-sensing data, International Journal of Geology
builtUpPct_source.quote: Built-up area: 299.63 sq km (45.83%) … in 2020 over the 654.20 sq km study area.

waterKm2_source.quote: No single citable source found for total water area within the simulator bbox ([72.77, 18.90, 73.05, 19.30]). The bbox includes Thane Creek, Mahim Bay, and mangrove wetlands — far larger than the three main lakes (~10.5 km²). Setting null to avoid fabricating a figure.

vehiclesIndex_source.title: Maharashtra Economic Survey 2022 — Statistical Appendix, Table on Motor Vehicles
vehiclesIndex_source.quote: Total motor vehicles registered in Mumbai (city + suburban) as on January 2022: 42.13 lakh (4,213,000). Bangalore baseline = 100 (≈ 12 million vehicles). Index = 42.13 / 120 × 100 ≈ 35.

populationM_source.title: Census of India 2011 — Primary Census Abstract, Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation area
populationM_source.quote: Population of Municipal Corporation of Greater Mumbai (MCGM): 12,442,373 (Census 2011). NOTE: UN World Urbanization Prospects 2024 estimates Mumbai urban agglomeration at ~22.5 million for 2026, but that covers a broader geography beyond MCGM. This file uses the MCGM-boundary figure for consistency with the simulator's bbox.
